knowledge_need: Study topic as Engineer-Philosopher. Attempt 1 of up to 3. Give compact Builder-relevant understanding, validation needs, and return plan.

part_digests.name: core meaning
part_digests.meaning: A minimal reusable Builder learning rule is a small rule for turning an experience into future-useful knowledge only when it has a bounded trigger, reusable action, retention path, and validation need.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Defines X as disciplined learning, not memory accumulation or route invention.
compact_missing_knowledge: exact threshold for reusable versus one-off
where the learned unit should live in current Builder surfaces
compact_safe_learning_steps: compare a few accepted past learning cases
keep the rule draft separate from accepted truth
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: show that the rule can classify at least one known case without changing route state
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X1 as the definition gate before considering any learning item reusable.

part_digests.name: why I am not ideal
part_digests.meaning: This topic exposes weakness in converting local observations into compact, validated, reusable behavior without overclaiming or storing noise.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Identifies why X is needed: the Builder can gather evidence but may fail to distill, retain, retrieve, and reuse it correctly.
compact_missing_knowledge: which failure mode is dominant: overfitting, forgetting, misrouting, or unvalidated promotion
whether current memory surfaces already encode this weakness
compact_safe_learning_steps: list recent learning failures as cases only
avoid editing accepted memory or route locks
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: match the weakness to evidence from a bounded prior case or validator result
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X2 to constrain the rule around actual Builder failure modes, not abstract intelligence ideals.

part_digests.name: builder relevance
part_digests.meaning: The rule matters if it helps the Builder self-build or build child agents by reusing proven lessons across similar tasks without becoming the brain or supervisor.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Connects X to practical capability growth: better candidate selection, safer compaction, clearer validation, and reusable decision patterns.
compact_missing_knowledge: which child-agent or self-build workflow would first benefit
what minimum behavior delta counts as useful
compact_safe_learning_steps: map the rule to one narrow workflow such as atom retention or decision reuse
keep runtime and accepted-core changes out of scope
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: demonstrate a specific future decision that the rule would improve or simplify
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X3 to reject learning rules that are elegant but do not change Builder behavior.

part_digests.name: validation
part_digests.meaning: Understanding is valid only when the rule predicts, classifies, or improves behavior under a bounded check; explanation alone is not proof.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Prevents X from becoming philosophy text without an operational test.
compact_missing_knowledge: available quick validators for learning-rule classification
acceptable proof size for a draft rule
compact_safe_learning_steps: compare expected category with observed result
stop after one bounded check unless validation loop is explicitly allowed
compact_validation_needed: evidence that no protected state was mutated
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X4 as the proof contract for promoting X beyond draft.

part_digests.name: promotion decision
part_digests.meaning: A learning item should be classified as a case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap based on recurrence, generality, trigger clarity, reuse value, and validation strength.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: Turns X into a routing rule for learning outputs instead of a vague decision to remember everything.
compact_missing_knowledge: promotion thresholds for atom candidate versus case pattern
compact_safe_learning_steps: test it on known cases without writing files
mark uncertain cases as open gap
compact_validation_needed: same input produces same category under repeat review
at least one example is correctly rejected from promotion
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: Use X5 as the final return classifier after X1-X4 establish meaning, weakness, relevance, and proof need.

dependencies: X2 depends on X1 because weakness must be measured against the rule definition
X3 depends on X1 and X2 because relevance requires both purpose and failure mode
X4 depends on X1 because validation needs a defined rule to test
X5 depends on X4 because promotion without proof is only labeling
duplicates_or_overlaps: X4 and X5 overlap on proof threshold
X2 and X3 overlap where a weakness becomes a capability need
X1 and X5 overlap on defining reusable knowledge
can_skip_for_now: none; all five are needed, but X3 can stay compact until a concrete workflow is selected

parent_return_plan.how_to_rebuild_x: Define the learning rule as: capture only bounded experiences with a reusable trigger, action, validation need, storage destination, and promotion class; otherwise keep as case note or open gap.
parent_return_plan.next_small_action: Run a read-only classification of one known learning case into case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap using the draft rule.
proof_needed: bounded case replay shows correct classification
validation evidence is recorded before any promotion claim
no route, runtime, accepted-core, or protected state is changed

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: Batch source answer is material only; default is compact case pattern with part map and parent return plan.
